headline: Strategic Value Bank Partners Opens $11.6 Million Position in OceanFirst Financial Ahead of Merger
summary: OceanFirst Financial Corp. is a New Jersey-based community bank holding company offering deposit accounts, lending, wealth management, and insurance services across the Northeast.
